input_text: Nak pergi bank tapi parking penuh. Nak guna mesin pun selalu offline. Servis macam ni patut kena shutdown.
reason: Bank parking and ATM reliability frustration, extreme suggestion to shut down.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah parking dan mesin ATM di bank boleh diselesaikan dengan lebih banyak mesin luar premis dan perkhidmatan perbankan dalam talian.

input_text: Got bitten by stray dog near my house. Nobody from the council comes to catch the strays. Wait for rabies outbreak first?
reason: Stray dog bite with council inaction, dramatic rabies concern.
suggested_rewrite: Stray dog bites should be reported to both the hospital and local council immediately. Request animal control services and get rabies vaccination as a precaution.

input_text: 马来西亚的邮政服务太不可靠了。重要文件都不敢寄。只能用快递但价格太贵。
reason: Postal service unreliable forcing expensive courier for important documents.
suggested_rewrite: 邮政服务可以通过挂号信增加安全性。对于重要文件，使用有追踪功能的服务并购买保险。

input_text: Hari-hari ada lorry bawak pasir lalu lalang depan rumah. Habis lantai berdebu. Complaint pun takde siapa ambil kisah.
reason: Sand trucks causing dust damage daily with ignored complaints.
suggested_rewrite: Lori yang mencemarkan kawasan kediaman perlu dilaporkan kepada JPJ dan PBT. Lori pasir wajib menutup muatan mengikut undang-undang.

input_text: Market vendor charge me extra just because I spoke English. He thought I was a tourist. Profiling customers is wrong.
reason: Language-based price discrimination at market assuming English speaker is tourist.
suggested_rewrite: Pricing should be the same for all customers regardless of the language they speak. Report price discrimination to KPDNHEP.

input_text: இந்த நகரத்தில் சைக்கிள் பாதைகள் இல்லை. சைக்கிள் ஓட்ட விரும்புவோருக்கு பாதுகாப்பான வழி இல்லை.
reason: No cycling paths in the city, unsafe for cyclists.
suggested_rewrite: சைக்கிள் பாதைகள் நிலையான போக்குவரத்தின் ஒரு பகுதி. நகர திட்டமிடலில் பாதுகாப்பான சைக்கிள் பாதைகள் சேர்க்கப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Nak pergi mahkamah pun kena tunggu kes dipanggil berjam-jam. Satu hari cuma untuk duduk dan tunggu. Sistem perlu reform.
reason: Court system requiring hours of waiting, inefficient scheduling.
suggested_rewrite: Sistem penjadualan mahkamah boleh diperkemaskan dengan slot waktu yang lebih tepat. Pendekatan digital boleh mengurangkan masa menunggu.

input_text: The new condo I bought has paper-thin ceiling. I can hear my upstairs neighbor's every footstep. Zero soundproofing.
reason: New condo with no soundproofing, hearing every footstep from above.
suggested_rewrite: Poor soundproofing in new condos is a construction quality issue. Report to the developer during the defect liability period and request remediation.

input_text: 公立学校的实验室设备都是坏的。学生只能看课本不能做实验。这样怎么培养科学人才？
reason: Broken laboratory equipment in public schools preventing hands-on science learning.
suggested_rewrite: 实验室设备对科学教育至关重要。学校可以通过企业赞助或教育部的设备更新计划获得新设备。

input_text: Nak complaint pasal pencemaran udara kat kawasan kilang ni pun tak tau nak pergi mana. Website JAS macam tak berfungsi.
reason: Unable to file air pollution complaint because JAS website is not working.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan pencemaran udara boleh dibuat melalui talian hotline JAS atau terus ke pejabat JAS negeri. Ambil gambar dan catat masa kejadian.

input_text: Road markings completely faded. Cannot see lanes properly especially at night. Accidents waiting to happen everywhere.
reason: Faded road markings creating invisible lanes and night driving danger.
suggested_rewrite: Report faded road markings with specific locations to JKR. This is a basic safety requirement that should be maintained on a regular schedule.

input_text: Setiap kali nak guna pusat kesihatan komuniti kena bayar walaupun kad pengenalan punya. Konon servis percuma.
reason: Community health center charging fees despite supposedly free services for citizens.
suggested_rewrite: Klinik kesihatan kerajaan menawarkan rawatan pada caj minimal. Jika dicaj berlebihan, semak dengan pentadbiran tentang jadual bayaran rasmi.

input_text: 这些连锁便利店垄断了整个社区。小商店都被挤出去了。竞争越来越不公平。
reason: Convenience store chains displacing small businesses, competition fairness concern.
suggested_rewrite: 小商店可以通过提供个性化服务和独特商品与连锁店竞争。公平竞争委员会监督市场垄断行为。

input_text: Kerja lebih masa tak dibayar bukan satu dua kali. Setiap minggu macam ni. Boss cakap 'part of the job'. Exploit betul.
reason: Regular unpaid overtime normalized by employer as part of the job.
suggested_rewrite: Kerja lebih masa wajib dibayar mengikut Akta Kerja 1955. Simpan rekod jam kerja sebenar dan laporkan pelanggaran kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja.

input_text: This apartment lift only fits 6 people but 30 floors. Morning rush hour wait 20 minutes for lift. Developer cheaped out.
reason: Undersized lift for 30-floor building causing 20-minute morning waits.
suggested_rewrite: Lift capacity should match building population. If the building was approved with inadequate lifts, raise it with the local council's building department.

input_text: கல்வி முறையில் மாற்றம் வரவேண்டும். மாணவர்கள் தேர்வுக்காக மட்டுமே படிக்கிறார்கள். உண்மையான கற்றல் இல்லை.
reason: Education system reform needed as students learn only for exams, not true learning.
suggested_rewrite: கல்வி முறை மாற்றம் முக்கியம். விமர்சன சிந்தனை மற்றும் படைப்பாற்றலை ஊக்குவிக்கும் கற்பித்தல் முறைகள் அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: Dah masak nasi pakai beras murah tapi beras tu keras macam batu. Quality control memang takde.
reason: Cheap rice quality so poor it's hard like stone after cooking, quality control complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Kualiti beras bersubsidi perlu dipantau. Jika produk tidak memenuhi standard, laporkan kepada KPDNHEP dengan sampel.

input_text: Cannot even find a decent playground for my kids in this whole township. Only got buildings and more buildings.
reason: Entire township lacking child-friendly recreation, over-development complaint.
suggested_rewrite: Township planning should include recreational spaces. Petition your local councilor for playground development using community space allocation budgets.

input_text: 公共停车场的CCTV全部是摆设。车被刮花了去查看记录，工作人员说摄像头没在录。
reason: Public parking CCTV non-functional, discovered only after vehicle damage incident.
suggested_rewrite: 停车场的CCTV系统应正常运行以保护用户。非功能性的监控系统可以向管理方和地方政府投诉。

input_text: Nak pindah masuk rumah baru tapi bekalan air belum disambung selepas 2 bulan. Developer cakap tengah proses. Rumah kosong dua bulan.
reason: New home without water supply for 2 months after handover, developer delays.
suggested_rewrite: Bekalan air asas perlu disediakan sebelum penyerahan kunci. Jika developer gagal, laporkan kepada Tribunal Pembeli Rumah dan SPAN.

input_text: All these beauty products sold online are fake or expired. No regulation at all. People's skin getting damaged.
reason: Unregulated fake and expired beauty products causing skin damage online.
suggested_rewrite: Only buy beauty products with NPRA notification numbers. Report suspicious products to KKM and the e-commerce platform.

input_text: Taman perumahan dah 10 tahun tapi lampu jalan masih takde. Developer janji nak pasang tapi vanish.
reason: 10-year-old housing estate still without street lights despite developer promise.
suggested_rewrite: Kemudahan infrastruktur yang dijanjikan developer adalah syarat kelulusan pembangunan. Laporkan kegagalan kepada PBT untuk tindakan penguatkuasaan.

input_text: 每次预约政府部门的服务，到了那里说系统出问题要改天再来。白白浪费一天。
reason: Government department appointments cancelled on arrival due to system issues.
suggested_rewrite: 政府部门应在系统故障时提前通知已预约的公众。建立短信通知系统可以避免不必要的来访。

input_text: Kawasan sekolah ni takde speed bump langsung. Kereta laju merata. Satu hari nanti budak kena langgar baru nak buat.
reason: No speed bumps near school zone despite fast traffic, child safety concern.
suggested_rewrite: Zon sekolah memerlukan bonggol jalan dan had laju yang dikuatkuasakan. Minta PIBG dan ADUN mendesak JKR untuk memasang langkah keselamatan.

input_text: My car warranty void because I didn't service at authorized center. But nearest authorized center is 100km away. Unfair policy.
reason: Car warranty voided due to distance to authorized service center, access issue.
suggested_rewrite: Warranty terms requiring authorized centers should consider geographic accessibility. Raise this with the manufacturer and consider KPDNHEP if the policy is unreasonable.

input_text: புதிய வீட்டின் சுவர்களில் பூஞ்சை வளர்கிறது. டெவலப்பர் பொறுப்பேற்க மறுக்கிறார்.
reason: Mold growth on walls of new house with developer refusing responsibility.
suggested_rewrite: புதிய வீட்டில் பூஞ்சை வளர்ச்சி கட்டுமான குறைபாடு. குறைபாடு பொறுப்பு காலத்தில் வீட்டு வாங்குபவர் தீர்ப்பாயத்தில் புகார் செய்யலாம்.

input_text: Kat bank cuma ada dua orang staff melayan customer. Queue sampai keluar pintu. Bank untung berbilion tapi staff sikit.
reason: Bank with billion-ringgit profits but only two staff at counters causing long queues.
suggested_rewrite: Bank perlu mengoptimumkan kakitangan kaunter mengikut jumlah pelanggan. Perbankan digital juga boleh mengurangkan keperluan lawatan fizikal.

input_text: Home internet installation appointment keeps getting pushed back. Already waited 3 weeks. How do I work from home without internet?
reason: Repeated internet installation delays affecting work-from-home capability.
suggested_rewrite: Escalate delayed installations to the ISP's complaints department and MCMC. Consider a portable hotspot as a temporary solution while waiting.

input_text: Sistem bas rapid ni selalu tukar laluan tanpa notice. Orang yang depend on bus nak pergi kerja macam mana?
reason: Bus route changes without notice disrupting commuters' work travel.
suggested_rewrite: Perubahan laluan bas perlu dimaklumkan lebih awal melalui pelbagai saluran. Penumpang tetap perlu diberi alternatif yang jelas.

input_text: 这个城市的行人道上到处都是摩托车。行人被迫走在马路上。城市管理太差了。
reason: Motorcycles on pedestrian sidewalks forcing walkers onto roads, urban management failure.
suggested_rewrite: 人行道上停放和行驶摩托车应被执法处理。市政厅可以安装护栏防止机动车辆进入人行道。

input_text: Siapa la yang design traffic light timing ni. Satu junction kena tunggu 5 minit. Dah macam nak tidur kat steering.
reason: Excessively long traffic light cycles at intersections causing frustration.
suggested_rewrite: Pemasaan lampu isyarat perlu dioptimumkan berdasarkan aliran trafik. Sistem lampu isyarat pintar boleh menyesuaikan masa mengikut kepadatan kenderaan.

input_text: Community market promised by developer during sales launch. 5 years later still an empty lot. False advertising.
reason: Developer promised community market 5 years ago still unbuilt, false advertising.
suggested_rewrite: Facilities promised in development plans are binding commitments. File a complaint at the Housing Tribunal with the original sales brochure as evidence.

input_text: Nak bayar zakat fitrah pun kena beratur panjang. Padahal boleh je buat online. Tapi orang tua mana reti guna telefon.
reason: Long queues for zakat fitrah payment, digital divide for elderly.
suggested_rewrite: Pusat kutipan zakat perlu menyediakan kedua-dua pilihan digital dan kaunter dengan kakitangan mencukupi untuk memudahkan semua golongan.

input_text: 这些出租车司机的车内很脏。座椅破旧，空调不工作。收费还很贵。
reason: Dirty taxis with broken seats, non-functional AC but high fares.
suggested_rewrite: 出租车应达到基本的卫生和舒适标准。可以通过APAD投诉不达标的车辆。

input_text: Nak beli tanah kat kampung sendiri pun susah. Proses tukar nama berbelit-belit. Tanah datuk nenek pun nak kena bayar premium.
reason: Difficulty buying ancestral village land due to bureaucratic transfer process and premium fees.
suggested_rewrite: Proses pemindahan hak tanah di kampung perlu dipermudahkan. Pejabat tanah daerah boleh membantu menjelaskan prosedur dan kos yang terlibat.

input_text: Pharmacy closed at 6pm in a residential area. Sick at night and nowhere to buy medicine nearby. Not thought through.
reason: No evening pharmacy access in residential area for nighttime emergencies.
suggested_rewrite: Residential areas should have access to 24-hour or extended-hour pharmacies. Check if nearby petrol station convenience stores carry basic medicines.

input_text: Motor lama aku kena reject JPJ inspection sebab minor issue. Tapi motor kapcai tanpa cermin depan berkeliaran free. Selective enforcement.
reason: JPJ vehicle inspection selective enforcement - strict for private but lax for unsafe motorcycles.
suggested_rewrite: Penguatkuasaan standard kenderaan perlu konsisten untuk semua jenis. Laporkan motosikal tidak selamat kepada JPJ untuk tindakan.

input_text: 图书馆的复印机坏了已经一个月了。学生复印资料都要去外面花更多钱。
reason: Library copier broken for a month forcing students to pay more elsewhere.
suggested_rewrite: 图书馆设施应及时维修。向图书馆管理员反映并要求尽快修复或提供替代方案。

input_text: Nak renew insurans motor online pun kena call agent. Agent caj extra RM50 untuk 'perkhidmatan'. Haram jadah betul.
reason: Forced to use agent for motorcycle insurance renewal with extra charge.
suggested_rewrite: Pembaharuan insurans kenderaan boleh dibuat terus melalui laman web syarikat insurans tanpa bayaran tambahan. Elakkan ejen yang mengenakan caj tidak wajar.
